nasb.text: So Mephibosheth lived in Jerusalem, for he ate at the king’s table regularly. Now he was lame in both feet.

esv.text: So Mephibosheth lived in Jerusalem, for he ate always at the king’s table. Now he was lame in both his feet.

cnv.text: 這樣，米非波設住在耶路撒冷，常常與王同席吃飯。可是他的雙腿都是瘸的。

ccb.text: 从此，双脚残废的米非波设就住在耶路撒冷，常常与王同席吃饭。
